name: Patient Case
history: Recent move and stress related to settling into a new living space. Difficult relationship with parents, especially mother, described as judgmental and emotionally unsupportive. Friendships have become strained, contributing to isolation.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't meet expectations, I will be criticized and rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't handle criticism and rejection, so I must avoid it.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of difficult conversations and situations that might lead to criticism.
situation: Preparing for a conversation with mother and expecting it to be challenging and superficial.
auto_thought: This conversation will only end in criticism and disappointment.
behavior: Avoids deep conversations and keeps interactions superficial to prevent conflict.
